history.text: Soviet administration north of the 38th parallel placed the territory under outside administration.
A provisional government was formed during the transition to state rule.
DPRK was established, giving North Korea a new political framework.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's North Korea.

worthSeeing.title: Mount Paektu:
worthSeeing.text: Sacred volcanic mountain on the Chinese border, revered as the spiritual homeland of the Korean people.

worthSeeing.title: Pyongyang:
worthSeeing.text: Monumental capital city of wide boulevards, socialist architecture, and mass spectacles.

worthSeeing.title: Kumsusan Palace:
worthSeeing.text: Mausoleum where Kim Il-sung and Kim Jong-il lie in state.
